name: claude-skills
description: Collection of Claude Code skills, organized by department prefix: dev-* (engineering: dev-flow, dev-up, dev-ship, dev-expo, dev-instantdb, dev-vercel-logs), marketing-* (SEO/growth: keyword/SERP research, AEO + crawler monitoring, reddit/youtube mining, x), comms-* (slack, whatsapp, notion), media-* (image-gen, video-gen, icon-search), brand-* (copy + design house style), data-* (digest), system-* (macOS hygiene), plus drafty-proof-canvas (visual proof canvases) and wendy (a personal execution coach built on a coaching corpus).
